summary: Handheld raw footage of an ICE/HSI street arrest in Chicago (Operation Midway Blitz) of a Panamanian man, with agents in POLICE/HSI/ERO vests walking him to a vehicle and a Spanish-language exchange shown in subtitles. It is documentary arrest footage, not a music-driven or stylized produced spectacle.
notable_text: Subtitle: 'You were arrested,'; vests read POLICE HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS, ICE, ERO
